rule_summary: Auction nomination cadence: 2 per 24-hour window per franchise
observed_behavior: performAuctionAction() accepts unlimited nominations; no per-franchise 24hr counter; no UI quota
gap: No server-side counter and no UI quota indicator
risk_summary: Owner can spam nominations to control the auction slate; rule unenforceable; bid sheet cannot rely on cadence compliance
recommended_fix: Add nomination_log D1 table; worker checks count vs 2 in last 24h before accepting; UI shows N/2 quota
blocked_by: New D1 table + worker counter logic + UI display

rule_summary: SF era starts 2022; TE Premium era starts 2025; concurrent (not sequential)
observed_behavior: era_for() returns SF_TE_PREM for any season >= 2022 (line 233); SF_ERA_START hardcoded 2022 (line 58)
gap: Missing SF_only era for 2022-2024; POSITION_INFLATION applies 2025+ TE multiplier (1.48) to 2022-2024 data
risk_summary: 2022-2024 TE valuations inflated ~15-20%; auction bid sheet historically inaccurate; affects every owner using model output
recommended_fix: Add SF_only era 2022-2024 with correct historical TE multiplier; update era_for(); regenerate model and audit downstream consumers
blocked_by: Keith confirms historical TE multiplier value; model regen

rule_summary: Tag eligibility: contract_year == 0 at submission time
observed_behavior: ETL pre-computes eligibility; CCC UI filters via cached JSON; no server-side re-check at submission
gap: UI-mediated only; mid-season manual contract edits leave the cached eligibility stale
risk_summary: Tag applied to player with > 0 years remaining → invalid contract state, wrong salary, wrong tag-tier calc, corrupted cap audit
recommended_fix: Worker tag-submission re-checks contract_year from fresh MFL rosters export; OR refresh tag_tracking.json hourly
blocked_by: Tag-submission worker hardening or hourly refresh

rule_summary: Rate limiting on public bug-report endpoint
observed_behavior: No auth and no rate limit
risk_summary: GitHub Issues spam (clutter only; not league-functional)

rule_summary: AI Q&A endpoint for extension questions
observed_behavior: Validates question/context length but does not query D1 to verify a specific player's eligibility
gap: Endpoint is informational; actual extension submission validated elsewhere (CCC)
risk_summary: Owner confusion if AI advice is incomplete or system prompt drifts; UX issue not enforcement gap
recommended_fix: Optional: add structured /extension-eligibility-check endpoint; current /extension-assistant is fine for Q&A

rule_summary: Rate limiting and dedup for MCM endpoints
observed_behavior: /mcm/nominate has form validation but no rate limit and status='approved' hardcoded; /mcm/vote has IP-hash dedup at line 2292
gap: No rate limit on nominate; no nominate-content dedup; vote endpoint dedup is partial
risk_summary: MCM page spam (cosmetic — MCM is non-league-functional fun side event)
recommended_fix: Rate-limit /mcm/nominate (2/IP/hr); add (display_name + URL) hash dedup over 7d window

observed_behavior: No explicit cap-floor or cap-ceiling validation found in worker/site/ETL
gap: Either MFL enforces server-side (acceptable) or there is a real gap; cannot verify without runtime test
risk_summary: If MFL doesn't enforce: every cap-changing endpoint (drops/restructures/MYM/trades) could allow violations
recommended_fix: Keith decides whether to add server-side floor/ceiling checks in worker; if added apply to all cap-changing endpoints
blocked_by: Keith decision on cap validation architecture
